name: Lucali
teaser: My favorite interior in the country. So cool it vaults Lucali from Good to Really Good.
review: My favorite interior in the country. So cool that it vaults Lucali from Good (based on just the pizza) to Really Good. This one is real tough to get into, but it's a unique New York pie and often a fairly magical experience.
headsUp: BYOB. No reservations. Get there at 5 PM and put your name on the list.
update: The wait is still absurd. The pizza still justifies it.
